## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai) and Andres Levinton (Superside/Superside.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company, growthx.ai, has rapidly grown to $7M ARR, offering AI-powered content/growth services](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Andres leads Superside.ai, a new creative analytics tool spun out of Superside's design services](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Both companies operate in similar spaces (creative/content services) with comparable deal sizes ($12-40K/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Marcel expressed interest in potentially recruiting Andres, though Andres is currently focused on Superside.ai](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds

  - [Superside: Design services company, grown from 70 to 800 people in 5 years](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Superside.ai: Creative analytics tool, launched 4 months ago, 5000+ teams using it](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [growthx.ai: AI-powered content/growth services, $7M ARR, 50 employees (up from 10 in January)](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

### growthx.ai Technology

  - [Custom-built workflow automation system, represented in code (not GUI-based)](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [AI coding agent for workflow creation and expert interaction](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Significantly faster than previous tools (e.g., 2 hours → 2 minutes for some workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Focus on backend infrastructure, not customer-facing UI currently](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

### Business Models

  - [growthx.ai: High-touch service model ($12-40K/mo deals) vs. SaaS to maintain higher revenue](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Superside.ai: Product-led approach, focusing on creative analytics tool](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)

### Growth Strategies

  - [growthx.ai: Organic growth so far, no marketing spend, waitlist through May](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Target: $20M ARR this year, $60M next year](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Hiring principal engineers and industry experts as managing directors](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Marcel expressed interest in Andres' experience and profile](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Discussed potential roles at growthx.ai, emphasizing flexibility and growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Andres currently focused on Superside.ai but open to further conversation](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send details on potential offer and role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Andres to consider the opportunity and get back to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting to dive deeper into roles and company fit](https://fathom.video/share/BxkDiAdAsxfjdYkvEew78hmV9DJ1cC4e?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
